notes: r7 tour for Changing the Display Language — tour tooltips removed on both language-list display beats using CSS transparency trick (background:transparent on .onboarding-tooltip + children). Presenter list CLEAN at ~12-15s (trimmed). Audience list CLEAN at ~44-49s (trimmed). Drops preview clips s10/s11 (preview step failed in r7 recording). 64.0s trimmed + 2s tpad + 2.6s outro = ~68.6s total. Supersedes r6 (commit c79ae7c).
youtube_chapters:
0:00 Presenter interface language (27 options)
0:18 Open a presentation and go to Settings
0:38 Audience display language (32 options)
youtube_chapters_notes: 3 chapters, ~68.6s total, AKB-18 r7, no preview section

steps.display_text: AhaSlides has two language settings — one for the presenter interface, one for the audience.
steps.tts_text: AhaSlides has two language settings — one for the presenter interface, one for the audience.

steps.display_text: Click the globe icon in the header to open the presenter language list.
steps.tts_text: Click the globe icon in the header to open the presenter language list.

steps.display_text: Choose from 27 interface languages — English, Español, Français, Deutsch, 中文, 日本語 and more. The interface switches instantly.
steps.tts_text: Choose from 27 interface languages — English, Español, Français, Deutsch, 中文, 日本語 and more. The interface switches instantly.

steps.display_text: Now let's set the audience language. It lives inside each presentation's Settings.
steps.tts_text: Now let's set the audience language. It lives inside each presentation's Settings.

steps.display_text: After opening a presentation, click Poll to add a slide — then we'll go to Settings.
steps.tts_text: After opening a presentation, click Poll to add a slide — then we'll go to Settings.

steps.display_text: Click the Settings icon in the right panel to open presentation settings.
steps.tts_text: Click the Settings icon in the right panel to open presentation settings.

steps.display_text: In the Settings panel, click Presentation language to reach the audience language picker.
steps.tts_text: In the Settings panel, click Presentation language to reach the audience language picker.

steps.display_text: AhaSlides supports 32 audience languages. English is selected by default. Scroll through Bahasa Indonesia, Čeština, Deutsch, Español, Français, and 27 more.
steps.tts_text: AhaSlides supports 32 audience languages. English is selected by default — scroll through Bahasa Indonesia, Čeština, Deutsch, Español, Français, and 27 more.

steps.display_text: Let's choose Español. All participant-facing text switches to Spanish immediately.
steps.tts_text: Let's choose Español. All participant-facing text switches to Spanish immediately.
